payload.title: Idempotent event-upload endpoint with union semantics
payload.description: Accept a batch of events, INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (tenant_id,event_id) DO NOTHING in one transaction, return the set of newly-applied events plus any renumbered notices. This return value is the canonical fan-out source for SCP-125 and the push-reply for SCP-123. Reject events whose tenant/principal mismatch the authenticated claim (SCP-122). (From SCP-124.)
